category_sources: source_facts.description says Qt-based Multimedia Player; official site says Qmmp is an audio-player written with Qt.
display_name_sources: Official site header uses Qmmp; source_facts.name is qmmp.
docs_sources: Official site provides description, feature list, requirements, downloads, and source checkout instructions; no separate dedicated docs site found.
repo_sources: Official Qmmp downloads page gives Subversion checkout commands for development sources including https://svn.code.sf.net/p/qmmp-dev/code/trunk/qmmp/.
tags_sources: Official Qmmp description and features page list audio-player role, Qt, supported formats, skins, playlists, and multimedia features.
